judge_result.short_rationale: Core eye-rinsing action is correct and first, but it misses the required timing detail to remove contact lenses after the first 5 minutes. Added advice not to rub/use eye drops and immediate ER escalation with product label are not grounded in the provided truth. Usable and concise overall.
